summary:
SignalForge represents a full-stack engineering achievement:

I built a deterministic artifact generation system that extracts engineering signal
from canonical event streams. The system handles complex constraints (determinism,
isolation, auditability) while providing deep insights into project patterns, failures,
and architectural decisions.

Key signal: I think in terms of systems—invariants, tradeoffs, constraints—and
build solutions that scale from correctness at their foundation, not performance shortcuts.

engineering_signals.title: Architecture: project-scoped-storage-boundaries
engineering_signals.problem: System needed project-scoped-storage-boundaries to remain scalable and maintainable
engineering_signals.approach: Each project has its own scoped artifact storage directory
tradeoffs_made: More disk usage multiplied by projects
engineering_signals.resolution_approach: Enforced through validation rules and deterministic guarantees
engineering_signals.platform_relevance: Core architectural principles transferable to any event-based system
engineering_signals.internal_tooling_relevance: Demonstrates systems design thinking and constraint-aware architecture
bullet_points: Applies to artifact paths, project contexts

key_achievements: Maintained deterministic artifact generation under all conditions
technical_capabilities_demonstrated: Principled system architecture and constraint-aware design
Systematic pattern recognition and signal extraction
leadership_indicators: Thorough documentation of decisions and patterns
system_thinking_indicators: Defines and enforces system invariants and constraints
Thinks in terms of patterns, relationships, and emergent properties

interview_narratives.title: Handling Complex Architectural Trade-offs
interview_narratives.story:
In building SignalForge, I needed to ensure deterministic artifact generation while working
        within project-scoped isolation boundaries. The challenge was: how do you maintain reproducibility
        across different runs and environments without external dependencies? I chose a canonical event stream
        as the source of truth, with deterministic generators that produce identical output from identical input.
        The tradeoff: this prevents using external AI models for summarization, but the benefit is complete
        auditability and reproducibility—critical for a system designed to capture engineering signal.
interview_narratives.interview_question: Can you tell me about a time when you made a difficult technical decision with clear tradeoffs?
talking_points: Identified core constraints: determinism, isolation, auditability
Result: system that is reproducible, auditable, and pattern-extractable
